entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop species studied for recombination rates.

entities.name: RECOMBINATION RATE
entities.description: The frequency of genetic recombination during gamete formation.

entities.name: FEMALE GAMETOGENESIS
entities.description: The biological process of producing female gametes.

entities.name: MALE GAMETOGENESIS
entities.description: The biological process of producing male gametes.

entities.name: RFLP MARKERS
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: RECIPROCAL THREE-WAY CROSSES
entities.description: A crossing technique used to compare recombination in male and female gametes.

entities.name: RECOMBINATION DISTANCES
entities.description: The distance between genetic markers based on recombination frequency.

entities.name: DISTORTED SEGREGATIONS
entities.description: Non-Mendelian ratios of alleles in offspring.

entities.name: POST-GAMETIC SELECTION
entities.description: Selection that occurs after the gametes have been formed.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Planned efforts to improve the genetic makeup of a crop.

entities.name: INHERITANCE EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Studies conducted to determine the patterns of trait transmission.
